zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Lisle於1317年出生在英國越可爾希亞活 卡素時，他的父親Sir Robert de Lisle of Biggleswade, 1st Baron de Lisle29歲，母親Margaret de Beauchamp19歲。他和Maud de Grey至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1355年10月14日在法國享年38歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Lisle于1317年出生在英国越可爾希亞活 卡素时，他的父亲Sir Robert de Lisle of Biggleswade, 1st Baron de Lisle29岁，母亲Margaret de Beauchamp19岁。他和Maud de Grey至少有3个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1355年10月14日在法国享年38岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lisle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Northumberland, Durham, and Yorkshire): variant of   Lyle   and a cognate of 2 below.
French: habitational name from L'Isle or Lisle, names of several places in various parts of France, named with Old French isle ‘island’ (from Latin insula). Compare Delisle .

variants.name: Lyle
meanings: Scottish and English (of Norman origin): topographic or habitational name from Anglo-Norman French del isle ‘from the island’ (from Latin de insula), denoting someone who lived on an island or who came from a place in France named Ile, Isle, or L'Isle. The surname may also in some cases be from Lille (Nord). Compare Lisle and Iles .

variants.name: Lile
meanings: English and French: variant of   Lisle  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Lisle was born in 1317, in Harewood Castle, Yorkshire, England, his father, Sir Robert de Lisle of Biggleswade, 1st Baron de Lisle, was 29 and his mother, Margaret de Beauchamp, was 19. He had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with Maud de Grey. He died on 14 October 1355, in France, at the age of 38.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Lisle est né en 1317, à Harewood Castle, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert de Lisle of Biggleswade, 1st Baron de Lisle, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Beauchamp, avait 19 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles avec Maud de Grey. Il est décédé le 14 octobre 1355, à France, à l’âge de 38 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Lisle 1317 in Harewood Castle, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert de Lisle of Biggleswade, 1st Baron de Lisle 29 und seine Mutter Margaret de Beauchamp 19. Er hatte mit Maud de Grey mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 14. Oktober 1355 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Lisle è nato il nel 1317 nel Harewood Castle, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Robert de Lisle of Biggleswade, 1st Baron de Lisle, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Margaret de Beauchamp, aveva 19 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie con Maud de Grey. Morì il 14 ottobre 1355, nel Francia, all'età di 38 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Lisleが1317年にイギリスヨークシュアイアハーエウッド カストルで生まれた時，父Sir Robert de Lisle of Biggleswade, 1st Baron de Lisleは29歳，母Margaret de Beauchampは19歳であった。彼はMaud de Greyとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1355年10月14日にフランスで38歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Lisle(이)가 1317년 영국 요르크실르 하레우드 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert de Lisle of Biggleswade, 1st Baron de Lisle(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret de Beauchamp(은)는 19세였다. 그는 Maud de Grey(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1355년 10월 14일 프랑스에서 38세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Woodburn, Northumberland, England, Unite: Norðhymbra land, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Lisle nasceu em 1317, em Harewood Castle, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert de Lisle of Biggleswade, 1st Baron de Lisle, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Beauchamp, tinha 19 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas com Maud de Grey. Ele faleceu em 14 de outubro de 1355, em França, com 38 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Lisle родился в 1317 г. в местности харюуд кастл, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Robert de Lisle of Biggleswade, 1st Baron de Lisle было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Beauchamp, 19. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от Maud de Grey. Он умер 14 октября 1355 г. в местности Франция в возрасте 38 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Lisle nació en 1317, en Harewood Castle, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Robert de Lisle of Biggleswade, 1st Baron de Lisle, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Margaret de Beauchamp, tenía 19 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas con Maud de Grey. Murió el 14 de octubre de 1355, en Francia, a la edad de 38 años.
